text: Being here, I feel a strange sense of transition—stepping between spaces, I sense anticipation and curiosity. The glass and the stark, modern design prompts a quiet introspection, while the vibrant, information-rich exhibition in the next room invigorates me. The play of colors and ideas stimulates my mind. My arms raised, I feel an openness, ready to receive new insights, yet also slightly self-aware of my movement in this curated environment. There is the thrill of possibility in the air, as if knowledge is just within reach.
